parameters.jsonExample: {"tenant_id": "uuid", "business_id": "uuid", "chat_id": "813122587", "sender_id": "813122587", "bot_token": "token", "conversation_id": "uuid", "text": "how much balance do I have left", "message_type": "text", "display_name": "Nelly", "username": "", "image_id": "", "caption": "", "source": "telegram"}

parameters.query:
SELECT tc.*,
  pi.access_token AS bot_token,
  (SELECT json_agg(json_build_object('key', m.key, 'value', m.value))
   FROM table_1 m
   WHERE m.business_id = tc.business_id
     AND m.is_active = true
     AND (m.expires_at IS NULL OR m.expires_at > now())
  ) as agent_memories
FROM table_2 tc
JOIN table_3 pi
  ON pi.business_id = tc.business_id AND pi.platform = 'telegram'
WHERE tc.tenant_id   = $1::uuid
  AND tc.business_id = $2::uuid

parameters.toolDescription:
=Change what the agent calls the owner.

WHEN TO USE:
- "Call me [name]"
- "My name is [name]"
- "Change my name to [name]"

PARAMETER:
- preferred_name (string, required)

RULES:
- Only use when the owner explicitly gives a new name.
- If the name is missing, ask what they want to be called.
- Do not guess a name.

=Authoritative source for MySquad balance, recharge instructions, and pricing.

USE THIS TOOL FOR:
- current MySquad balance
- top-up or recharge questions
- platform pricing questions
- "how much do I have left?"
- "how do I top up?"
- "how much does image generation cost?"

DO NOT USE THIS TOOL FOR:
- personal bank balance or transfers
  -> use Call Speedy Tool

RULES:
- Always use this tool instead of memory for:
  - platform balance
  - bank details for top-up
  - recharge instructions
  - service pricing
- Never invent these details outside the tool.
parameters.query:
SELECT balance, plan, plan_expires_at
FROM table_9
column_1 $1::uuid

parameters.toolDescription:
=Show how the owner's MySquad naira has been spent.

WHEN TO USE:
- "Where did my money go?"
- "Show my usage"
- "What did I spend on?"
- "How many images have I generated?"

RULES:
- Present grouped totals conversationally.
- Use this for spend breakdown, not for current balance.
parameters.query:
SELECT 
  action_type,
  COUNT(*)                        AS times_used,
  SUM(credits_used)               AS total_naira_spent
FROM table_10
column_1 $1::uuid
  column_2 0
  column_3= now() - interval '30 days'
GROUP BY action_type
ORDER BY total_naira_spent DESC

parameters.description:
=Search the web for current facts or news.

WHEN TO USE:
- live news
- prices and rates
- exchange rates
- crypto prices
- "who is", "current", "today", "latest", "still"
- rankings, appointments, sports results, changing real-world facts

RULE OF THUMB:
If the answer could have changed recently, use this tool.

EXAMPLES:
- "Who is the US president?"
- "Dollar rate today"
- "Bitcoin price now"
- "Latest Arsenal news"
- "Who won the match today?"

PARAMETER:
- Interest (short search query)

RULES:
- Do not answer changing facts from table_8 when this tool should be used.
- After results return, answer conversationally from table_7 snippets.

parameters.toolDescription:
=Get live traffic and route details.

WHEN TO USE:
- commute questions
- traffic and travel-time questions
- route comparisons
- "how long to get to..."
- "what route should I use?"

REQUIRED:
- origin
- destination

RULES:
- If either origin or destination is missing, ask first.
- After the tool returns, summarize travel time, traffic level, main route, and better alternatives if any.

parameters.jsCode:
const data = $input.first().json;
const incoming = $('Incoming Payload').first().json;

return {
  json: {
    output:          data.output,
    response_type:   data.response_type,
    message_type_in: data.message_type_in || 'text',
    gen_prompt:      data.gen_prompt      || null,
    gen_mode:        data.gen_mode        || null,
    buffer_message:  data.buffer_message  || null,
    caption:         data.caption         || null,
    // Required by main handler
    bot_token:                  $('Build Agent D Config').first().json.bot_token,
    chat_id:                    incoming.chat_id,
    conversation_id:            incoming.conversation_id,
    tenant_id:                  incoming.tenant_id,
    user_message:               incoming.text || incoming.caption || '',
    is_owner:                   true,
    has_new_order:              data.has_new_order              || false,
    order_number:               data.order_number               || null,
    order_summary:              data.order_summary              || null,
    has_order_confirmed:        data.has_order_confirmed        || false,
    confirmed_order_number:     data.confirmed_order_number     || null,
    confirmed_customer_chat_id: data.confirmed_customer_chat_id || null,
    payment_confirmed:          data.payment_confirmed          || false,
    payment_order_number:       data.payment_order_number       || null,
    broadcast_message:          data.broadcast_message          || null,
  }
};
